## Palo Alto Networks Launches Tenzai AI Attack Simulation Tool Within Cortex XDR Platform

Tenzai deepens Cortex XDR's platform stickiness by adding AI-driven offense simulation — a differentiator that supports PANW's platformization narrative; PM should read this product launch against the separate PANW price-drop story to assess whether the news was offset by another negative catalyst.

- Palo Alto Networks (PANW) launched Tenzai, an AI-powered attack simulation capability integrated into Cortex XDR.
- The product expands PANW's AI-native security offering into proactive adversarial testing functionality.
- High classifier confidence; directly relevant to vertical AI applications and AI-native security themes.
- This is a concrete product addition, not a partnership or roadmap announcement.
